subject: Re:
body:
Let me read it first.  I will play with it and call you around 8 am.



----- Original Message -----
From: jeffrey epstein [littlestjeff@yahoo.com]
Sent: 12/20/2007 09:21 PM PST
To: Jay Lefkowitz
Cc: me <jeeproject@yahoo.com>



we need to talk I think except for Merry Xmas, little should be said to Alex,, you can naplogize  that the pitch was aggressive, from our team , because to a person everyone is sincere and outraged, by what has gone on.


      ____________________________________________________________________________________
Be a better friend, newshound, and
